policy: Add only fully free/open/local-first capabilities to the seven-project core. Paid, rate-limited, account-dependent, unknown-license, or heavy setup tools are blocked from core and replaced with Kattappa-built local behavior or a small optional adapter.

sqlite_builtin_backend.purpose: Default local database/backend state for every project without another service or Docker stack.
sqlite_builtin_backend.license: SQLite public-domain style plus Kattappa-built local schema code

pocketbase_optional_backend.purpose: Optional one-file open-source backend with realtime database, auth, files, and admin UI when a project outgrows plain SQLite.
guardrails: approval required before enabling user accounts, network listeners, or file sharing

local_product_analytics.purpose: Local SQLite event, error, funnel, and feature-usage logs for product improvement without PostHog cloud or heavy self-hosting.

local_workflow_queue.purpose: SQLite-backed jobs, retries, schedules, and approval checkpoints for background workflows without Inngest cloud or license complexity.

local_multi_agent_orchestrator.purpose: Approval-gated manager-worker agent routing, evidence capture, task queueing, and test-before-apply loops inspired by Antigravity/TurboQuant/Odysseus patterns.

manual_export_billing_playbook.purpose: No-payment default: CSV exports, manual invoices, and local product-readiness notes until a project explicitly needs payments.

local_deck_generator.purpose: Prompt-to-deck Markdown outline generator for pitch decks, project demos, investor notes, and README-ready presentations without Pitch or Gamma accounts.

mermaid_diagram_generator.purpose: Text-to-flowchart and text-to-mindmap Mermaid generator for architecture, repair workflows, incident reports, learning maps, and product docs.
mermaid_diagram_generator.license: Kattappa-built local workflow plus Mermaid-compatible output

local_context_compressor.purpose: Headroom-style deterministic compression for logs, tool output, notes, and file snippets before they enter local agent context.

local_schedule_planner.purpose: Vela-style scheduling plan templates using local tasks, reminders, and calendar-ready text instead of hosted scheduling agents.

ui_tars_inspired_operator_policy.purpose: GUI-agent policy for observe, guide, assist, and autonomous modes using screen/OCR/accessibility evidence and approval gates.
ui_tars_inspired_operator_policy.license: Kattappa-built local policy inspired by open GUI-agent research

openjarvis_local_assistant_patterns.purpose: Local-first assistant design patterns for voice, screen, memory, tools, and privacy-preserving evaluation.
openjarvis_local_assistant_patterns.license: Kattappa-built local implementation; upstream pattern only

openbci_mne_research_adapter.purpose: Safe research-only BCI/EEG analysis path using OpenBCI-style hardware concepts and MNE-Python-style analysis without invasive-device claims.
openbci_mne_research_adapter.license: Research adapter boundary; verify dataset and hardware licenses before use
guardrails: no mind reading or memory upload claims

local_code_review.purpose: CodeRabbit-style local diff review for secrets, unsafe shell, debug leftovers, broad exceptions, TODO/FIXME markers, and simple SQL injection risks.

local_gsd_workflow.purpose: Plan, execute, verify, and fix workflow for coding tasks inspired by GSD, Ralph coding loops, and agentic development platforms.

local_document_markdown.purpose: Built-in text, HTML, and CSV to Markdown conversion for AI-friendly document notes without a mandatory external converter.

markitdown_optional_adapter.purpose: Optional open-source Microsoft MarkItDown adapter for richer PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, image, audio, and HTML conversion when installed locally after approval.
guardrails: adapter can be removed without breaking the built-in fallback

local_marketing_kit.purpose: Pomelli/Ralph-style local brand hooks, campaign posts, email subjects, and CTAs without connecting ad accounts, stores, or hosted brand tools.

local_network_scanner.purpose: Safe Nmap-style local/private TCP port checks for AI Cyber Shield, with Nmap used only when already installed and a Python socket fallback otherwise.
guardrails: loopback, private, or link-local targets only
no exploit or vulnerability script execution

nmap_optional_adapter.purpose: Optional Nmap CLI adapter for network discovery and security auditing on user-owned local/private networks.
nmap_optional_adapter.license: Nmap Public Source License; free for end users, inspect redistribution terms before bundling
guardrails: no NSE exploit or intrusive scan profiles in default app flow

local_friday_voice_assistant_patterns.purpose: FRIDAY-style voice-first assistant flow using Kattappa's local wake-word, STT/TTS fallback, MCP-like tool boundaries, approvals, and desktop app shell.
local_friday_voice_assistant_patterns.license: Kattappa-built local voice/tool workflow; upstream demo as pattern only

local_blackbox_coding_assistant.purpose: Blackbox-style coding help using local project index, local code review, plan-execute-verify-fix workflow, and local repo prompt export.

local_personal_assistant_patterns.purpose: Personal-assistant app patterns for opening apps, schedule/task helpers, screenshots, and local automation behind Kattappa approval gates.
local_personal_assistant_patterns.license: Kattappa-built local assistant workflow; external repos as pattern references only

topics.decision: Do not add as a core dependency because it is an account/cloud agent platform with usage tiers. Add the useful pattern locally: manager-worker coding agents, browser evidence, approval gates, test logs, and resumable tasks.

Self-hosted Supabase is useful but adds Docker/service complexity, so it is not default core. Keep SQLite as default and allow PocketBase as the one-file open-source backend adapter when realtime/auth/file storage are actually needed.
Blocked from core because payments are not fully free. No project gets payment processing until the user explicitly asks for monetization.
Do not add cloud tracking or heavy default self-hosting. Add local product analytics so every project can improve from usage/error events without sending data away.
Do not add as a core dependency because the current server/CLI licensing is not the clean fully-free baseline for these projects. Use the existing SQLite workflow queue and optional Node-RED adapter.
Treat as an unknown/commercial multi-agent idea, not a dependency. Add the free local orchestration pattern instead.
Do not copy repo code unless license/source review approves it. Keep the useful idea as a local AI workspace pattern using Kattappa memory, project index, local model profiles, and approved adapters.
Keep as an optional setup helper for macOS/Linux only. Do not make it a Windows-first requirement.
Freemium/account presentation tools are blocked from core. Add a local Markdown deck generator for pitch decks and project demos.
Gamma has a free plan but paid tiers/branding/credits make it unsuitable as a core dependency. Add the same local deck generator instead.
Napkin is useful for text-to-visual thinking but its credit/paid plan model is not a fully free core dependency. Add Mermaid diagram generation locally.
Hosted scheduling agents are not core dependencies. Add local scheduling-plan templates and route durable follow-ups through Kattappa long tasks.
Headroom is open-source and useful, but Kattappa now has a built-in deterministic local compressor so no dependency is required for the core.
Use JARVIS repos as pattern references only. Kattappa keeps its own local assistant stack for voice, screen, memory, tools, approvals, and evaluation.

The open-source GUI-agent direction is useful, but Kattappa should not hand uncontrolled desktop access to a model. Add the policy locally: observe/guide first, approval before assist/autonomous actions.
Implantable BCIs are medical devices and are blocked from product core. Add only safe research notes and non-invasive/open EEG analysis paths for NeuroSeed learning research.
The useful idea is the disciplined plan, execute, verify, fix loop. Add that workflow locally instead of making an external coding framework a core dependency.
Use autonomous coding-loop ideas as a reference only. Kattappa keeps the loop local, approval-gated, test-first, and scoped to one project at a time.
Hosted PR review is not a core dependency because project code should stay local by default. Add a local heuristic reviewer and keep Git/test checks as the verification baseline.
Microsoft MarkItDown is a useful open-source adapter, but Kattappa should still work without installing it. Add a built-in Markdown fallback and list MarkItDown as an optional local adapter.
Hosted marketing/brand generation is useful but not a fully free local core dependency. Add local campaign-kit drafting for project pages, demos, and release notes.
Store automation and ad-account marketing tools stay outside the core. Use a local marketing-kit generator for copy drafts and manual export until a project explicitly needs commerce integration.

Nmap is a useful free network discovery/security-audit tool, but it should stay optional rather than bundled. Add a safe local/private network scanner to Cyber Shield and use Nmap only when already installed.
Use the voice-agent/tool-routing architecture as a reference only. Do not add Gemini, LiveKit, OpenAI TTS, Sarvam, or any hosted voice stack as a required dependency.
Blackbox AI is useful as a coding-assistant idea but has paid tiers and hosted account flows, so it is not a core dependency. Add local coding assistant behavior instead.
Use personal-assistant repos as pattern references only. Kattappa keeps its own desktop app, voice, screen, task, and approval architecture.
